title: xiigen.i18n-translation.master-cache-complete.v1
description: Terminal event emitted by T667 MarketplaceTranslationCacheJob after translating the marketplace base terms and writing them to CAS + lookup ref under MASTER_TENANT_ID CLS (CF-811). tenantId on this envelope is always MASTER_TENANT_ID. `skipped: true` indicates the CF-816 SETNX idempotency key was already held — another worker produced the entry.

tenantId.description: Always MASTER_TENANT_ID for this event — marketplace base translations live under the master tenant (CF-811).

moduleId.description: Marketplace module slug whose base terms were translated.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale of the cached master translation.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 (64 lowercase hex) of the master translation JSON blob.

skipped.description: True when CF-816 SETNX idempotency key was already held — job was a no-op dedup. Absent/false means this job produced the entry.
